title: Mute Copyrighted Audio
description: Add an option to sound options to only allow whitelisted music to play.
body:
'Mute Copyrighted Audio' creates a whitelist so that players can only play music that they have approved. This could be useful for content creators who worry about the possibility that their videos may be copyright struck.

Presets can be cycled through in the 'Music & Sounds' options panel.

I cannot, and will not guarantee that it will prevent anyones content using copyrighted audio from being copyright claimed. Forge/Quilt versions are planned, but not currently being worked on. Additional languages will be up to the community to assist in translations.

Mod Menu is optional, but required for advanced customizations to the whitelist.

I hereby grant permission to do whatever you want with 'Mute Copyrighted Audio'.
